name: Evolution API
description: Self-hosted WhatsApp integration API with Baileys support, PostgreSQL persistence, and Redis caching.

envVars.description: Public URL for the Evolution API server
PostgreSQL bind mount in host:container format
Redis bind mount in host:container format
PostgreSQL connection URI used by Evolution API
Redis URI used by Evolution API

composeOverride:
# Generated by McHarbor App Store
services:
  {{serviceName}}:
    image: {{image}}
    container_name: {{containerName}}
    restart: unless-stopped
    depends_on:
      - {{serviceName}}-postgres
      - {{serviceName}}-redis
{{ports}}
{{volumes}}
    environment:
      SERVER_NAME: evolution
      SERVER_TYPE: http
      SERVER_PORT: "8080"
      SERVER_URL: {{env.EVOLUTION_SERVER_URL}}
      SERVER_DISABLE_MANAGER: "false"
      DATABASE_PROVIDER: postgresql
      DATABASE_CONNECTION_URI: {{env.EVOLUTION_DATABASE_CONNECTION_URI}}
      DATABASE_CONNECTION_CLIENT_NAME: evolution
      CACHE_REDIS_ENABLED: "true"
      CACHE_REDIS_URI: {{env.EVOLUTION_REDIS_URI}}
      CACHE_REDIS_PREFIX_KEY: evolution-cache
      CACHE_REDIS_SAVE_INSTANCES: "true"
      CACHE_LOCAL_ENABLED: "true"
      AUTHENTICATION_API_KEY: {{env.EVOLUTION_API_KEY}}
      AUTHENTICATION_EXPOSE_IN_FETCH_INSTANCES: "false"
      CONFIG_SESSION_PHONE_CLIENT: McHarbor
      CONFIG_SESSION_PHONE_NAME: Chrome
      LOG_LEVEL: ERROR,WARN,INFO
      LOG_BAILEYS: error
      TELEMETRY_ENABLED: "false"
  {{serviceName}}-postgres:
    image: postgres:16-alpine
    container_name: {{containerName}}-postgres
    restart: unless-stopped
    command:
      - postgres
      - -c
      - max_connections=1000
      - -c
      - listen_addresses=*
    volumes:
      - {{env.EVOLUTION_DB_VOLUME}}
    environment:
      POSTGRES_DB: {{env.EVOLUTION_DB_NAME}}
      POSTGRES_USER: {{env.EVOLUTION_DB_USER}}
      POSTGRES_PASSWORD: {{env.EVOLUTION_DB_PASSWORD}}
  {{serviceName}}-redis:
    image: redis:7-alpine
    container_name: {{containerName}}-redis
    restart: unless-stopped
    command: redis-server --appendonly yes
    volumes:
      - {{env.EVOLUTION_REDIS_VOLUME}}
